verse_text: that you may walk properly toward those who are outside, and that you may lack nothing.

pericope.title: Who Will Participate in Christ's Return

links.context: Those... who are outside is an ancient Semitic expression for those outside the community of God (see WSir, Prologue; [[MRK.4:11]]; [[COL.4:5]]; [[1TH.4:12]]; [[1TI.3:7]]).
